channel.title: React-JS on Jeremy Pellerino | Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in React-JS on Jeremy Pellerino | Portfolio

item.title: Tic-Tac-Toe
item.description: This is yet another rendition of the tic-tac-toe game. My first application written with ReactJS, it establishes the use of ReactJS basics like React.createElement and ReactDOM.createRoot to build the site. The AI is based on the minimax algorithm.
